description: Known data gaps — everything attempted and failed to retrieve publicly in this collection run.

data.what: Ward list (~8,809 wards) with INEC codes
data.why_failed: Both INEC domains returned TLS certificate errors / connection closed
data.unblock: Operator fetches INEC ward register PDF or Excel from inecnigeria.org directly

data.what: Polling unit list (~176,846 PUs) with registered voter counts and coordinates
data.unblock: Download INEC PU register Excel file from inecnigeria.org or use IReV API

data.what: State-by-state presidential election results for all 37 jurisdictions, 2011–2023
data.why_failed: Wikipedia articles truncated by WebFetch length limit; Stears returned 404; Dataphyte returned 403
data.unblock: Operator fetches INEC EC8E forms (official) or Harvard Dataverse Nigeria elections dataset (free)

data.what: All constituency-level legislative results (109 Senate seats, 360 House seats) 2011–2023
data.unblock: INEC official gazette or Harvard Dataverse

data.what: All off-cycle gubernatorial results (Anambra 2013-2025, Edo 2012-2024, Ekiti 2014-2022, Ondo 2012-2024, Osun 2014-2022, etc.)
data.why_failed: Wikipedia articles for these specific elections returned 404 at the URL patterns tried
data.unblock: Search Wikipedia for '[year] [state] gubernatorial election' — URL pattern varies

data.what: Per-state literacy rates, age distribution, religion breakdown
data.why_failed: Not present in Wikipedia sources at the granularity needed
data.unblock: NBS Nigeria Literacy Survey 2019; NPC census 2006 state tables; Afrobarometer Round 9/10 subnational data
NBS 2022 Multidimensional Poverty Index report (publicly available); NBS quarterly unemployment reports

data.why_failed: Only annual data available on Wikipedia
data.unblock: NBS CPI monthly press releases or World Bank WDI API

data.why_failed: Wikipedia has only selected data points
data.unblock: CBN rates (cbngov.org) for official; Stears for parallel market history; AbokiFX historical archive

data.why_failed: Wikipedia article specific to pump prices not found
data.unblock: NNPCL price notices; NBS petroleum product pricing reports
NERC annual reports; TCN data; NBS

data.what: Monthly incident counts by state and event type (ACLED data)
data.why_failed: ACLED data not on Wikipedia; ACLED site not fetched
data.unblock: ACLED free download at acleddata.com (requires registration); CFR Nigeria Security Tracker

data.what: IReV per-state upload compliance percentages for 2023
data.why_failed: INEC domains unreachable; Wikipedia doesn't have this
data.unblock: INEC 2023 post-election report; Yiaga Africa or Civic Hub IReV analysis

data.what: Headlines from Punch, TheCable, Vanguard, Daily Trust, Sahara Reporters, BusinessDay, The Nation, Channels TV, Arise, TVC
data.unblock: Use headless browser (Playwright/Puppeteer); try RSS feeds; use Wayback Machine CDX API for cached versions

data.what: Headlines from international wire services (Reuters Nigeria, AP Nigeria, AFP Nigeria)
data.unblock: Reuters Nigeria tag page; AP Nigeria; AFP text service
Use Wayback Machine CDX API; or residential IP

data.what: Stat Strategy, Bloom Public Affairs, ANAP Foundation, Africa Polling Institute polls
data.unblock: Fetch pollster websites; media-commissioned poll PDFs on Premium Times

data.what: 2027 gubernatorial candidates for states holding elections
data.why_failed: Not yet available — primaries not held
